title: Sustained Support
subtitle: Nourishing energy and strength
description: As your body’s demands continue to increase, you may experience occasional fatigue. Focusing on iron-rich foods, proper hydration, and balanced meals can help support your energy and overall well-being.
what_to_expect: Occasional fatigue or low energy moments
Consistent appetite with increased nutritional needs
Greater importance of hydration and iron intake
nutrition_focus: Maintain consistent hydration throughout the day
Focus on balanced meals that provide sustained energy
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Healthy snacks like nuts, roasted chana, fruit bowls, or curd
Protein sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or ignoring hunger signals
hydration: Drink water consistently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Balanced nutrition and hydration help support your energy and comfort.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced meals and hydration help maintain stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced meals and hydration support steady energy.

anemia.personalized_description: Higher focus on iron-rich foods and hydration supports energy and helps manage fatigue.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent nourishment supports your strength and energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals and proper hydration support stable blood pressure.
hypertension.reassurance: Balanced meals and hydration support a calm routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: Consistent meals and hydration support metabolic balance and energy levels.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency and hydration support your body's rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on iron-rich foods, hydration, and balanced meals helps maintain strength and stability.
priority_nutrition: Maintain regular meal and snack timings
Stay well hydrated throughout the day
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady nourishment and hydration support your overall well-being.
